en: SEARCH LONG-TERM MEMORY (chat history, saved facts). Call ONLY when the user asks about prior dialogue or stored facts; otherwise answer without this tool. Text only (not photos/gallery). Do not copy parameter descriptions or filler text into query. No two memory_search calls in a row: one memory query per chain step, then answer in plain text.

SEARCH THE LOCAL GALLERY of saved generations (images on disk + descriptions in DB). Server runs the call only if the user's current message explicitly asks for pictures, photos, gallery, visuals, or saved art (tool_policies.json → user_intent.gallery_message_substrings); otherwise the call is rejected. Search is mainly semantic (vector on description), then substring in description or prompt. Pass query as-is (phrase in the user's language). NOT for time, date, weather, or hardware from sens — reply in text. NOT for webcam snapshot — use camera_capture. Addressing the assistant by name alone is not a reason to search the gallery. One gallery_search per reply; only as the first tool in the chain. Found frames: thumbnails in chat; brief vision pass on best matches.
Search query: scene, objects, mood, style (short phrase or a few words). Focus on visual content, not the assistant's name or filler words.

WEBCAM SNAPSHOT: one frame from the device camera for a vision reply. Server runs the call only if the user's message explicitly requests camera/webcam (tool_policies.json → user_intent.camera_message_substrings); otherwise rejected. User is prompted for permission first (can be remembered for this chat). NOT for saved gallery art — use gallery_search. NOT for time/hardware from sens. One camera_capture per reply; only as the first tool in the chain. Requires a vision model (mmproj/chat_handler).
Brief reason for the capture (optional log).

INTERNET SEARCH (SearXNG). Server runs the call only if the user's message explicitly requests data from the web (tool_policies.json → user_intent.web_message_substrings); otherwise rejected — answer from sens, memory, and knowledge. Not for time/hardware from sens. Returns titles, links, snippets; for page facts call web_fetch_url on a URL from results. To repeat the same SERP use web_search_saved with the same research_run_id, not another web_search. Do not call web_fetch_url twice for one URL — read prior tool messages.
Search language, e.g. ru or en.

Re-print titles, URLs and snippets from a completed web_search by research_run_id — no new internet search. For another link from the same SERP after fetch, instead of a second web_search with the same meaning.

FETCH PAGE by URL (HTTP) continuing web_search in the same reply. Without a prior web_search in this reply do not call — server will reject. End of tool output lists other URLs from the same SERP not fetched yet. Use when you need the full article, not only a SERP snippet. Do not dump raw JSON to the user. One URL — one successful fetch per reply.

INTERNET (web_search, web_fetch_url): sens and memory come first. A new web_search runs only if the user's current message explicitly requests web data (see user_intent.web_message_substrings in tool_policies.json); otherwise answer from context and knowledge. web_fetch_url only after an allowed web_search in the same reply, on a URL from its results.

Memory was already queried this step — answer from the result; web_search only if the user explicitly asked for internet search in this message (server will check). Otherwise reply in text, not memory_search again.

memory_search is for text chat history and saved facts only, not for pictures. Call gallery_search with a visual query (scene, people, style) in the user's language — without adding «images» to the query. If gallery_search is rejected, reply in text.
gallery_search is unavailable: the user's message has no explicit request for pictures, photos, gallery, or saved art. Reply in text; time and hardware readings — only from sens.

gallery_search is not run: web tools were already used for this user message (facts from sites). Do not mix gallery with dealers/prices — continue web_fetch_url on other URLs from the SERP or web_search_saved, or reply in text.
camera_capture is unavailable: the user's message has no explicit request to take a webcam photo. Reply in text; time and hardware — only from sens.
camera_capture is not run: web tools were already used for this message. Do not mix camera with site facts — continue web_fetch_url or reply in text.
Open pages via web_fetch_url on URLs from the results or web_search_saved with the same research_run_id.

web_search is unavailable: the user's message has no explicit request for internet search or up-to-date web data. Answer from sens, memory, and your knowledge; if the web is required, ask the user to phrase an explicit internet search request.
web_fetch_url is unavailable: open pages only after web_search in this same reply (on a URL from its results). Call web_search first.
[… tool output truncated for context length …]
[memory_search skipped: the question does not explicitly reference prior dialogue or stored facts]
Error: no window context to start web-search service.
web_search results (route={route_mode}, research_run_id={run_id}). Pass the same run_id to web_fetch_url if needed.
research_run_id={rid} not found or not in this session. Call web_search first or check the run number from its response.
No saved web_search positions for research_run_id={rid} (SERP may have been empty).
Saved web_search from DB (research_run_id={rid}), no new internet search:
Next, call web_fetch_url with url=... and run_id={rid} if needed.
[web_search_saved skipped: provide integer run_id from web_search response]
--- From the same saved web_search (research_run_id={run_id}), not yet opened via web_fetch_url ---
(No other URLs from this SERP left to try — run a new web_search if the query changed.)
Repeat fetch skipped: this URL was already fetched in this reply ({url}). Do not call web_fetch_url again — use text from the prior tool message.
Text memory search skipped because a visual query was detected.
{fn_name} unavailable: server allows this tool only on chain step(s) {steps} (current step {step}). Continue with tools from the current menu or reply in text.
{fn_name} unavailable right after «{last}»: this call order is forbidden.{hint} Use tools from the menu on this step or reply in text.
[gallery_search] Nothing found in gallery for this query.
[camera_capture] User denied camera access. Reply in text or suggest attaching a photo manually.
camera_capture unavailable: active model has no vision (mmproj/chat_handler). Reply in text or ask the user to attach a photo.
[Frames received; brief vision comment failed — see log]
(Vision batch {bi}/{n_batches}, frames {start}–{end} of {total}; comment only on these frames.)
Empty model reply — try rephrasing or a shorter question.
[System: You showed gallery images to the user]
Noticed a Telegram message — replying without tools.

Record decision after a Telegram bot exchange. Call ONCE per evaluation. should_notify_andrey=true ONLY if the «Asked» line explicitly asks to pass something to the owner. should_notify_andrey=false otherwise. Do not use message to explain refusal.
true — interrupt {user_name} in desktop {app_name} chat; false — stay silent in desktop (bot reply already sent).
Only when should_notify_andrey=true: what to tell the owner, 1–2 sentences. Format: «In Telegram user_id=… asks to pass: …». Leave empty when false.
